hypothesis: Systems-optimizer history becomes safer if every kept backlog card and kept hypothesis-card artifact must retain the exact five-command scope-local promotion bundle, not just seeded cards and the latest kept pointer.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` only exact-checked the scope-local promotion bundle for seeded cards and `state.last_kept_change`, so older kept backlog items or their replayable hypothesis cards could drift to wider evaluation bundles and still verify clean. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any kept backlog item or kept hypothesis-card artifact whose `evaluation_bundle` differs from the exact five-command scope-local promotion bundle, while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if every kept systems-optimizer backlog card and kept hypothesis-card artifact must use the exact five-command scope-local promotion bundle and the fixed evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Historical kept systems-optimizer cards must preserve the exact promotion bundle, or replayable history can silently widen the proof surface after promotion.
